article.title: NVIDIA and Thinking Machines Lab Announce Long-Term Gigawatt-Scale Strategic Partnership
article.summary: NVIDIA and Thinking Machines Lab announced today a multiyear strategic partnership to deploy at least one gigawatt of next-generation NVIDIA Vera Rubin systems to support Thinking Machines’ frontier model training and platforms delivering customizable AI at scale. Deployment on the NVIDIA Vera Rubin
